title: MMI Daily Iron Ore Index Report March 13 2026
section_path: MMI Daily Iron Ore Index Report March 13 2026
section_path_text: MMI Daily Iron Ore Index Report March 13 2026
summary:
Main
in Chinese iron ore and steelmaking prices 13/03/2026
The con nuous iron ore contract opened with a gap up today, showing strength in the early morning but weakeningin the a ernoon. The main contract, I2605, eventually closed at 811.5 CNY/ton, up 2.33% from the previous trading session. Meanwhile, spot prices increased by 5-10 CNY/ton compared to the previous trading day.
